title: agents-meta.ts schema extension + sync-meta.ts Shadow Mirroring refactor
description: Extend AgentsMetaNode schema with layer (L0|L1|L2) and topology_type (mirror|cross-cutting) fields aligned with Round 3 Shadow Mirroring architecture. Refactor sync-meta.ts to scan only .fabric/agents/**/*.md (not colocated AGENTS.md files in business directories). Add deriveLayer() function for path-depth-based layer inference (.fabric/agents/root = L0, one level deep = L1, two+ levels = L2; _cross/ prefix = L1 by default). Add topology_type inference (_cross/ → cross-cutting, others → mirror). Ensure backward compatibility: old agents.meta.json files missing new fields get default values via migration logic. Note: topology_type enum is mirror|cross-cutting (not colocated|rules-frontmatter from R2 — R3 reversed that).

files.change: Add layer: z.enum(['L0','L1','L2']) and topology_type: z.enum(['mirror','cross-cutting']) fields to agentsMetaNodeSchema. Update AgentsMetaNode TypeScript interface accordingly. Do NOT add paths_frontmatter field (dropped in R3). Keep existing fields: file, scope_glob, deps, priority, hash.

Rename findAgentsFiles() to findFabricAgentsFiles() and change scan target to .fabric/agents/**/*.md (not AGENTS.md files in project root or business directories). Add deriveLayer(relativePath: string): 'L0'|'L1'|'L2' — count path segments under .fabric/agents/: root file = L0, 1 level = L1, 2+ levels = L2; any path under _cross/ = L1. Add deriveTopologyType(relativePath: string): 'mirror'|'cross-cutting' — path contains /_cross/ → cross-cutting; else → mirror. Update createDefaultNodeMeta() to include layer and topology_type derived from file path. Add migration logic in computeAgentsMeta(): for nodes in existing meta missing layer or topology_type, fill defaults derived from file path.
Add layer: 'L0' and topology_type: 'mirror' to the initial L0 node created by createInitialMeta(). This ensures fresh fab init produces agents.meta.json with correctly typed nodes from first run.

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts to understand current schema before modifying
Update agentsMetaNodeSchema and AgentsMetaNode interface: add layer z.enum(['L0','L1','L2']) and topology_type z.enum(['mirror','cross-cutting']); run tsc to verify
Read packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts lines 61-200 to understand findAgentsFiles and computeAgentsMeta before refactoring
Rename findAgentsFiles() → findFabricAgentsFiles() and update glob target to .fabric/agents/**/*.md
Implement deriveLayer(relativePath: string) using path segment counting under .fabric/agents/ prefix
Implement deriveTopologyType(relativePath: string) using /_cross/ path segment check
Update createDefaultNodeMeta() to call deriveLayer() and deriveTopologyType()
Add backward-compat migration: in computeAgentsMeta(), after reading existingMeta, for each node missing layer/topology_type, populate defaults from path
Read packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts lines 208-221 and update createInitialMeta() L0 node with layer and topology_type
Run tsc --noEmit from packages/cli and packages/shared

reference.pattern: Existing deriveNodeId() pattern in sync-meta.ts for path-based inference; agentsMetaNodeSchema Zod pattern
reference.examples: conclusions.json round3_delta.new_technical_solutions[2] defines topology_type: mirror|cross-cutting; conclusions.json recommendations[2].steps define deriveLayer() behavior

criteria: agentsMetaNodeSchema includes layer: z.enum(['L0','L1','L2']) and topology_type: z.enum(['mirror','cross-cutting'])
AgentsMetaNode TypeScript interface includes layer and topology_type fields
sync-meta scans .fabric/agents/**/*.md only (verified by running sync-meta on a project with colocated AGENTS.md — colocated files NOT included in output)
Old agents.meta.json without layer/topology_type fields: running sync-meta migrates nodes to include default values without data loss
fab init on fresh project: resulting agents.meta.json L0 node has layer='L0' and topology_type='mirror'
tsc --noEmit passes for packages/shared and packages/cli

rationale.chosen_approach: Extend existing schema with two new required fields (defaulted for migration); refactor findAgentsFiles scan target; add two pure derivation functions (no new I/O needed)
alternatives_considered: Keep scanning both AGENTS.md and .fabric/agents/ (double-scans produce duplicate coverage — incompatible with R3 Zero-Pollution)
Add paths_frontmatter field as well (dropped in R3 — topology_type mirror|cross-cutting replaces R2 topology model)
decision_factors: R3 verdict: scan only .fabric/agents/**/*.md — business dirs have ZERO rule files
minimatch in get-rules.ts:38 already decouples physical location from scope_glob — Shadow Mirroring has near-zero tech cost for the server
topology_type values are mirror|cross-cutting per R3 new_technical_solutions; not colocated|rules-frontmatter from R2
rationale.tradeoffs: Projects that still have colocated AGENTS.md from before migration will have those files ignored by sync-meta; this is intentional but must be documented in migration guide (TASK-008)

manual_checks: Run fab sync-meta on examples/werewolf-minigame-stub after adding .fabric/agents/ files; verify output agents.meta.json has layer and topology_type on every node
Create .fabric/agents/_cross/security.md in fixture; run sync-meta; verify topology_type=cross-cutting and layer=L1
Create a legacy agents.meta.json without layer/topology_type; run sync-meta; verify fields are added without other data loss
success_metrics: tsc --noEmit exits 0 for packages/shared and packages/cli
agentsMetaSchema.parse() validates JSON with layer and topology_type fields
sync-meta integration test: zero colocated AGENTS.md files scanned in a project with both colocated and .fabric/agents/ files
unit: sync-meta.test.ts: deriveLayer() unit tests for all 4 path patterns
sync-meta.test.ts: deriveTopologyType() unit tests for mirror and cross-cutting paths
agents-meta.test.ts: schema parse test with new fields
integration: sync-meta integration test on werewolf fixture with mixed old/new meta file

risks.description: Renaming findAgentsFiles may have callers outside sync-meta.ts that need updating
risks.mitigation: Search for all callers of findAgentsFiles before renaming; update all call sites
risks.fallback: Keep old name as deprecated alias pointing to new function

risks.description: Migration of old meta files may silently change topology_type for L0 root.md nodes if deriveLayer path logic has edge cases
risks.mitigation: Add explicit unit test: deriveLayer for root .fabric/agents/root.md returns L0
risks.fallback: Migration writes defaults with clear comment; user can verify via fab sync-meta --dry-run if implemented

key_functions.purpose: Infers semantic layer from file path under .fabric/agents/; root file = L0, 1-level subdir = L1, 2+ levels = L2
Infers topology type: paths containing /_cross/ segment are cross-cutting, all others are mirror
